c.d: Number of active users on the app, indicating potential reach and buyer pool
Percentage or flat fee charged per sale, impacting seller profitability
How simple and fast it is to create a listing including photo upload, description, and pricing
Availability of shipping methods such as prepaid labels, home pickup, or local meetups
Types of items the app is best suited to sell (e.g., fashion, electronics, furniture)
Features like pricing suggestions, analytics, instant pay, and buyer-seller communication tools
